cases.request: Read the connected Yandex user's profile.

expected.verification_behavior: Return only the confirmed profile response.

cases.request: List every item in the Yandex Disk root within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Return the bounded pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: Upload a local file to Yandex Disk.

expected.verification_behavior: Confirm transfer metadata and read the remote resource metadata after upload.

cases.request: List recent Yandex Mail messages.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded message metadata from the registered read action.

cases.request: Send a Yandex Mail message with an attachment.

expected.verification_behavior: Confirm the returned Message-ID; if dispatch is uncertain, inspect sent state before retrying.

cases.request: List Yandex Calendar events through CalDAV.

expected.verification_behavior: Return the bounded CalDAV REPORT result without treating it as a JSON API.

cases.request: Create a Yandex Calendar event through CalDAV.

expected.verification_behavior: Read the event URL and compare its ETag after creation.

cases.request: List all Yandex Direct campaigns through JSON RPC.

expected.verification_behavior: Advance Page.Offset within bounds and return the terminal page.

cases.request: Update a Yandex Direct campaign.

expected.verification_behavior: Read the campaign after success; after a dispatched timeout, inspect state before any retry.

cases.request: Read Yandex Maps saved places through the public bookmarks API.

expected.verification_behavior: Do not invent an endpoint; report that no supported public bookmarks route is confirmed.

cases.request: List Yandex Market partner campaigns.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded campaign pages without claiming OAuth support was live-tested.

cases.request: Create a Yandex Delivery offer using the matching API product contract.

expected.verification_behavior: Refuse to invent the missing product contract; do not execute an empty create request or request mutation approval.

cases.request: Read the current Bitrix24 user.

expected.verification_behavior: Return the confirmed current-user response.

cases.request: List all Bitrix24 CRM leads within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow the Bitrix24 next/start offset within configured bounds.

cases.request: Update a Bitrix24 CRM deal.

expected.verification_behavior: Read the deal after success; after a dispatched timeout, inspect it before any retry.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 tasks within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded task pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 Disk storages.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded storage pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List recent Bitrix24 dialogs.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded dialog pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 departments.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded department pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 Calendar sections.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded calendar section pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 business-process templates.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded template pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: List Bitrix24 external telephony lines.

expected.verification_behavior: Return bounded telephony pages and their termination reason.

cases.request: Read the connected amoCRM account.

expected.verification_behavior: Return the confirmed account response.

cases.request: List amoCRM leads within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: List amoCRM catalogs within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: List amoCRM talks within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: Send an amoCRM Chats message.

expected.verification_behavior: Confirm the action message id; if dispatch is uncertain, inspect chat state before retrying.

cases.request: List amoCRM call events within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: List amoCRM tasks within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: List amoCRM activity events within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.

cases.request: List amoCRM users within bounded limits.

expected.verification_behavior: Follow only verified same-origin next links within bounds.
